title: GUIDA PER L'ESPLORAZIONE DELLE RETI TEMATICHE
subtitle: COME PROGETTARE E IMPLEMENTARE RETI TEMATICHE PER MASSIMIZZARE IL COINVOLGIMENTO E L'IMPATTO SUGLI UTENTI
description: A practical guide for coordinators and consortium members to design and implement thematic networks in agriculture and forestry. It presents frameworks, best practices and engagement strategies to maximize user involvement and impact throughout the network lifecycle.
